name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit
prompts.template: Perform a detailed marketing and performance audit on the website: {website_url}
prompts.use_case: Marketing agencies auditing client websites and generating comprehensive marketing strategies

prompts.name: generate_marketing_copy
prompts.template: Create compelling marketing copy for the product/service described as: {product_or_service_details} targeting {target_audience}
prompts.use_case: Businesses automating multi-channel marketing content creation including emails and ads

prompts.name: email_sequence_creation
prompts.template: Develop an email marketing sequence based on these requirements: {email_sequence_requirements}
prompts.use_case: Competitive analysis and market intelligence reporting for strategic planning

prompts.name: ad_campaign_planning
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign including copy and strategy for these parameters: {ad_campaign_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Creating scheduled content calendars to manage marketing outputs efficiently

prompts.name: content_calendar_generation
prompts.template: Create a content calendar aligned with the marketing brief: {marketing_brief}
prompts.use_case: Producing client-ready deliverables summarizing marketing audits and campaign plans

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence
prompts.template: Analyze the following competitive market data and generate an intelligence report: {competitive_market_data}
